---
title: "toeplitz_2d"
generated: true
description: "Construct a 2-D Toeplitz matrix from a first column and first row."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.linalg.matrix`](../nitrix-linalg-matrix.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:toeplitz_2d -->
```python
toeplitz_2d(c: Float[Array, 'mc'], r: Optional[Float[Array, 'nr']] = None, *, shape: Optional[Tuple[int, int]] = None, fill_value: float = 0.0) -> Float[Array, 'm n']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:toeplitz_2d -->
Construct a 2-D Toeplitz matrix from a first column and first row.

Based on the recipe in
https://github.com/google/jax/issues/1646#issuecomment-1139044324
(the @mattjj / @blakehechtman "vmap-over-roll" pattern).  This
underperforms on TPU but is the fastest approach on GPU.

Unlike `scipy.linalg.toeplitz`, when `c[0] != r[0]` the
*column*-leading element wins (`r[0]` is ignored).  The
output supports rectangular shapes and a fill value for cells
outside the originally-specified support.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:toeplitz_2d -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `c` | `Float` | `mc` | — | First column. Length `mc`; extended to `m` with `fill_value` if needed. |
| `r` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'nr']]` | — | `None` | First row. Length `nr`; extended to `n` with `fill_value` if needed. If `None`, defaults to `c` (symmetric Toeplitz). |
| `shape` | `Optional[Tuple[int, int]]` | — | `None` | Output `(m, n)`. Defaults to `(len(c), len(r))`. |
| `fill_value` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Fill for cells outside the support of `c` / `r`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `m` × `n`. The `(m, n)` Toeplitz matrix whose first column is `c` and whose first row is `r`, with cells beyond the support of `c` and `r` set to `fill_value`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:toeplitz_2d -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `mc` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
